risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: The project faces persistent high-level political and governance risks that are constraining implementation progress. The Systematic Operations Risk-Rating Tool maintains a 'High' rating for Political and Governance throughout the project lifecycle, indicating ongoing fragility in the political environment affecting KWSC operations and project delivery.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High (at Approval 27 Jun 2019), High (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 010 - 20 Dec 2024), High (Proposed Rating)

risk_title: Delayed Reform Implementation Due to Governance Constraints
risk_summary: Progress on KWSSIP-supported reform activities remains significantly delayed, with multiple reform components being deferred to a follow-on project. This suggests governance capacity constraints or political obstacles are preventing timely implementation of institutional reforms necessary for KWSC's financial and operational performance improvements.
evidence_quote: However, progress on many of the KWSSIP-supported reform activities remains delayed, and some activities will be shifted to the follow-on project of KWSSIP-2.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity and Governance Challenges in Service Delivery to Informal Settlements
risk_summary: Implementation of water and sewerage services in informal settlements is severely lagging, with one location (Essa Nagri) at only 29% completion. This reflects governance and institutional capacity challenges in extending services to vulnerable populations in a fragile urban environment.
evidence_quote: Informal settlements provided with improved water and sewer services by KWSC under the project (Number): The progress of the 2 locations are: Soba Nagar: 82.5%; and Essa Nagri: 29%.
